# terrible_community_proxmox_proxmox_storage (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `name` (String) The name of the storage displayed in the storage list.
- `type` (String) The storage type/protocol to use when adding the storage.

### Optional

- `cephfs_options` (String) Extended information for adding CephFS storage.
- `cifs_options` (String) Extended information for adding CIFS storage.
- `content` (String) The desired content that should be used with this storage type. Required when `state=present`.
- `dir_options` (String) Extended information for adding Directory storage.
- `iscsi_options` (String) Extended information for adding iSCSI storage.
- `nfs_options` (String) Extended information for adding NFS storage.
- `nodes` (String) A list of Proxmox VE nodes on which the target storage is enabled. Required when `state=present`.
- `pbs_options` (String) Extended information for adding Proxmox Backup Server as storage.
- `state` (String) The state of the defined storage type to perform.
- `zfspool_options` (String) Extended information for adding ZFS storage.

### Read-Only

- `storage` (String) Status message about the storage action.
